name: Keep of the knights
short_description: Keep of the Knights is a battle simulator game where you can battle hordes of barbarians and other monsters. Upgrade your armor and weapons, hire allies, and, of course defend your keep!!!
detailed_description:
Prepare for Battle

Recruit your troops and strategically position them on the battlefield. Place them wisely to defend against relentless waves of enemies. Will you create a solid front line, or will you hold back and counterattack at the right moment? The choice is yours.

Arm Yourself for War

Purchase powerful weapons and armor to enhance your character's health and stamina. Equip yourself with swords, shields, and bows to suit your combat style. Strengthen your defenses and prepare for the challenges ahead.

Face Endless Waves of Enemies

Survive against relentless enemy waves that grow stronger over time. Each round, new foes arrive, testing your strategy and resilience. In certain waves, powerful bosses will enter the battlefield—will you and your army be strong enough to defeat them?

Command the Battlefield

Switch between a strategic RTS view and third-person combat. Oversee the battlefield from above, directing your troops to victory, or step into the fight yourself and lead your army from the front lines. Adapt your perspective to control the battle as you see fit.

How long can you and your army survive the onslaught? Prepare, strategize, and fight for survival!
